stories.headline: Alibaba's Qwen3.8 Max claims to rival top AI models
stories.blurb: Alibaba released a preview of Qwen3.8 Max, positioning it as competitive with frontier models and second only to Anthropic's Fable 5. The model enters an increasingly crowded field of companies claiming near-parity with leading AI systems.
stories.why_it_matters: China's top tech companies are closing the gap with Western AI labs faster than expected.
stories.original_headline: Alibaba’s Qwen Unveils Preview of Flagship AI Model

stories.headline: Claude Code just switched from Node to Bun (written in Rust)
stories.blurb: Anthropic quietly moved Claude Code's runtime from Node.js to Bun, a JavaScript runtime built in Rust that's known for faster startup and execution. The change means Claude Code agents now spin up quicker and run more efficiently when they're writing and testing code for you.
stories.why_it_matters: Faster runtimes mean agents can iterate on code in less time — and waste fewer tokens waiting.
stories.original_headline: Claude Code uses Bun written in Rust now

stories.headline: Cursor's Slack bot now works across repos and shares its plan first
stories.blurb: Cursor in Slack got three upgrades: it tells you what it's about to do before starting, works in codebases with multiple repos, and can follow conversations across different channels and threads. No more guessing what the bot will change or switching contexts manually.
stories.why_it_matters: Less friction between where you talk about code and where you actually write it.

stories.headline: Google renames NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
stories.blurb: Google's AI note-taking app is getting a rebrand. NotebookLM is now called Gemini Notebook, though it'll stay a standalone app even as Google weaves it tighter into Gemini and Search. The tool first launched as Project Tailwind in May 2023.
stories.why_it_matters: Another Google product gets absorbed into the Gemini brand umbrella.
stories.original_headline: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook

try_this_prompt.title: The priorities lie detector
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'll tell you my top three priorities for this quarter. For each one, tell me what I'd have to stop doing this week to prove I actually mean it. Then rank them by which one I'm most likely lying to myself about.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: When your to-do list and your stated priorities haven't met in months.

daily_question: If you could swap one tool in your stack for its faster competitor today, which would it be?

args.reason: THE defining AI story today - Apple suing OpenAI is a major legal action between two tier-1 AI companies. This is load-bearing AI news that everyone in the industry will be talking about. Must lead the edition.

Major model launch from Alibaba - Qwen3.8 Max described as comparable to frontier models and second only to Anthropic's Fable 5. Concrete capability hook with competitive positioning. Strong tier-1 source.
